entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: 프로젝트 코치는 수동적으로 답만 모으는 대신 AI를 학습에 집중해 활용하는 방식입니다. 이 모드는 특정 학습 과제를 중심으로 만들어졌습니다. 계획 a 학교, creative, 코딩, or personal project 함께 scope, milestones, blockers, and 다음 행동s.

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide

entries.source: Start the live mode at Project Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Research Assistant. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: 프로젝트 코치에서 실시간 모드를 시작하세요. 가까운 학습 형식을 원한다면 연구 도우미도 시도해 보세요. 플랫폼을 더 넓게 보려면 AI 학습 동반자가 모두를 위해 무엇을 해야 하는지 읽어 보세요.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell the 모드 무엇 당신 are trying to learn or produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of 하나 giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a 목표, try something, get 피드백, repair the weak spot, and choose the 다음 행동.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matters. A general chatbot can 답 almost anything, but a 학습 모드 gives the conversation a shape. It nudges 당신 toward the kind of 생각, 연습, 피드백, or exploration that helps the 아이디어 stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: 이 is the same habit behind studying 함께 AI 없이 cheating yourself: keep the 학습자 능동적인. AI is most 유용한 언제 it gives 당신 피드백 on 당신의 생각.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for project coach with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.

entries.value: Try the 단계 in 당신의 own words.

entries.source: Turn ideas into milestones.
entries.value: Turn 아이디어 into milestones.

entries.source: Use Project Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: 빠르게 시작하면서도 나에게 맞게 조정되는 세션을 원할 때 프로젝트 코치를 사용하세요. 첫 목표는 그럴듯하게 보이는 것이 아니라 다음 단계가 가능하다고 느끼게 하는 것입니다.

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
